title: feat: add community model price floor
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
## What

- Adds one shared positive price floor: `0.000001` Pollen per 1M tokens (`1e-12` per token).
- Keeps `0` and blank dashboard prices explicitly free.
- Enforces the floor in the API and dashboard, so CLI and direct callers receive the same server validation.
- Adds API and form boundary tests for free, exact-floor, below-floor, negative, and malformed values.

## Why

Prevents misleading non-zero prices that are effectively too small to be meaningful while preserving free community models.

## Impact

No migration or repricing. Existing rows are unchanged; the floor applies when a price is created or updated.

## Checks

- `npx vitest run src/community-endpoints.test.ts`
- `npx vitest run test/community-endpoint-price-input.test.ts`
- Enter and Gen typechecks
- Biome formatting and diff checks

gist.headline: Tiny prices, proper roots
gist.blurb: Community model prices now have a sensible minimum once they stop being free. Zero remains zero; everything else gets enough soil to grow in.
gist.summary: Added a shared minimum non-zero community-model price of 0.000001 Pollen per 1M tokens (1e-12 per token), enforced consistently by the dashboard and API while preserving blank and 0 prices as free.
gist.impact: Model creators and API callers now get the same validation for free, exact-floor, below-floor, negative, and malformed prices, with existing model prices left unchanged.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy community-model price garden: Polly carefully places a tiny but visible price seed at a marked minimum line, while a clearly labeled FREE flower pot remains open and flourishing. A retro terminal and dashboard price panel show that both direct API callers and the web form follow the same garden boundary.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly, a cute pixel art bee mascot with a yellow body and dark brown horizontal stripes, small black legs, two black antennae, black vertical oval eyes, bright pink rectangular blush marks on cheeks, a small happy smile, and small rounded light blue translucent wings, wearing tiny gardener glasses while measuring a tiny price seed above a glowing minimum line beside a flourishing flower pot labeled "FREE"; a friendly CRT monitor robot displays matching API and dashboard price fields, with code-plants and soft flowers around them. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background, chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley or A Short Hike, pixel-font text: "0.000001 POLLEN / 1M", nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
